Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0C00 "ANDROID2-0900-0C00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Android 2.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0900 to set $C0 to $80 so that the game defaults to joystick instead of keyboard on startup.
